name: Dutch Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Light cream or Half & Half 1/3 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the egg yolks and 1/4 cup of confectioners' sugar until well blended for about 5 minutes.
3. Beat in the cheese, cream, flour, lemon juice, lemon rind, and raisins.
4. Beat egg whites until frothy. Gradually add the remaining confectioners' sugar and continue to beat until the whites form stiff peaks.
5. Fold the egg whites into the cheese mixture.
6. Pour the cheese mixture into the prepared crust.
7. Bake for 45 minutes.
8. Cool to room temperature before chilling.
